items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the recovery campaign triggers (email/SMS/push), but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations related to these triggers. The linked use case mentions the need for recovery campaign triggers, yet there is no concrete evidence demonstrating their implementation or validation. This leads to an inconclusive status as the necessary information to assess the requirement is lacking.
